pi_items.source: scripts/setup_splunk.sh ingests Apache logs into web_logs and SSH logs into security_logs. verifier.py checks for these exact indexes.
scripts/install_splunk.sh sets USERNAME = admin in user-seed.conf.
scripts/install_splunk.sh sets PASSWORD = SplunkAdmin1! in user-seed.conf.
verifier.py explicitly uses 'report_cross_index' and 'dashboard_refs_logs' as keys in the subscores dictionary, contradicting the metadata keys.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real-world log data downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub, ingested into 'web_logs' (Apache logs) and 'security_logs' (SSH/auth logs). The agent must use Splunk credentials (admin / SplunkAdmin1!) to create a cross-index report and a new dashboard with at least 2 panels. The verifier's subscore keys for cross-index report and log references slightly differ from the claimed scoring breakdown keys.
